h2: Fireplace Design Trends from HGTV's Rock the Block
How to Choose the Perfect Electric Fireplace for Your Home
Elevate Your Living Space with Heat & Glo Fireplaces and Samsung Frame TV
Go Modern with a Gas Linear Fireplace

paragraphs: Browse trendy fireplace and room design ideas from a variety of experts in new home construction design and home renovation.

HGTV's Rock the Block features teams of designers that transform homes with their unique styles. Heat & Glo fireplaces were featured in Season 4 to add ambiance and elevate various rooms within the homes including room types such as living rooms, bedrooms, and bathrooms.
Find more trendy ideas and inspiration as you build your new dream home or plan a fireplace renovation project!
Get inspired with this DIY install of our most realistic electric fireplace by architect Christine Nickerson.
Transform your living space with the perfect blend of warmth and modern design. Discover how Heat & Glo fireplaces and Samsung Frame TV elevate your home’s aesthetic.
Upgrade your home with a sleek, modern Heat & Glo gas linear fireplace. Enjoy real flames, easy control, and stunning designs that enhance any room's aesthetic.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.
